name: Your old home | ITU, MARCUS & JUNE
description:
Your companions had always been curious about your past.

You never really talked about it nor brought it up.

So when you got the opportunity to visit the place you once called home, with some consideration and a little more push from your friends, you eventually decided to revisit it with them.

—————————————————————————

Shadow Descendant/Original Character POV

I had to make separate starting messages to give you guys a variety. Have fun!
creator: YaBoiM1guel
